description_long: This is a large, rustic log cabin with a prominent, steeply pitched hip roof covered in dark shingles. The structure is primarily constructed from thick, round timber logs, which are visible at the corners and along the walls, giving it a traditional log cabin appearance. The front facade features a covered porch supported by sturdy log columns, providing a sheltered entryway. Windows are arranged in clusters, with a large set of windows on the side and smaller, symmetrically placed windows along the front and rear. The roof has deep overhangs, and a small chimney protrudes from one side, suggesting a fireplace or wood stove inside. The cabin sits on a stone or concrete foundation, elevating it slightly above ground level.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a steep hip roof, covered porch, and clustered windows, built from thick timber logs and set on a stone foundation.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and front of the cabin, highlighting the covered porch, log columns, and the expansive hip roof.
description_view_1: The front view displays the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the main entrance beneath the porch, with visible log construction details.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the large window cluster and the chimney on the roof, as well as the log wall construction and roof overhang.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a long stretch of the cabin with multiple small windows and the continuous hip roof, with no visible doors.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with deep overhangs, covered in dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple windows of varying sizes, with a large cluster on one side and smaller, symmetrically arranged windows on the front and rear facades
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch
